HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SHREE MAZUMDAR'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. ADDITIONAL WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS DENIED. SHREE MAZUMDAR HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER SIGNED AND ENDORSED FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
